# Infinia Metal Credit Card
## By Invite Only
  * 5 Reward Points for every ₹ 150 spent
  * 24 x 7 Global Personal Concierge
  * Unlimited global airport lounge access

More Benefits Than Ever Before
Welcome Benefits
  * Complimentary Club Marriott membership for first year. [Here.​](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card/Club_Marriott_Membership_T_C.pdf)

  * Earn 5 Reward Points on every Rs.150 spent*​

Dining Benefits

## Additional Benefits
### Welcome Benefits:
  * Complimentary Club Marriott membership for first year. [Here.(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card/Club-Marriott-Membership-T-and-C.pdf)  
​  

    * Up to 25% discounts for Dining & stay across Asia – Pacific region​.
    * **Member's Night on Monday:** Buy one drink, get a complimentary second drink.
    * **Member's Day on Tuesday:** 50% off on food bill & 25% off on beverage bill.
  * Renewal benefit 12,500 Reward Points* upon fee realization and card activation.
  * Renewal fee waiver - Spend 10 lakhs or more in the preceding 12 months and get renewal membership fee waived off for next year.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card "View More")
![Infinia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Travel, Hotel & Dining Benefits
  * Unlimited complimentary **Domestic** airport lounge access in India with your HDFC Bank Infinia Credit Card (Primary & Add-on).
  * Unlimited complimentary **International** airport lounge access outside India **via Priority Pass** for Primary and Add-on cardholders (1,000+ lounges worldwide).
  * View List of eligible Lounges [here.(opens in a new tab)](https://lms.hoi.in/lounge-list/hdfc-infinia) Click here to [know more](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card/airport-lounge-access-program-30sep2025.pdf)
  * Book stay for 3-nights and pay for two at participating ITC hotels.
  * 1+1 complimentary buffet at participating ITC hotels. [Know More.(opens in a new tab)](https://hdfcinfinia-itcoffers.thriwe.com/)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card "View More")
![Infinia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Golf Benefits   

  * Unlimited Complimentary **Golf lessons & games** at leading courses across India and select courses across the world.
  * Enjoy **100% green fee waiver** at select golf courses worldwide.
  * 24x7 **Golf Concierge Assistance** services for booking/cancellation at 1800 118 887 | 022 42320226.
  * To check the golf course list- [CLICK HERE(opens in a new tab)](https://golfoperationstatus.thriwe.com/hdfc-8a90d89a0s8d/index.php), For T&C- [CLICK HERE(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card/Golf-T-and-C-for-INFINIA-05-08-25.pdf)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card "View More")
![Infinia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Concierge Benefits
  * Here are some of the services provided by our concierge.​
  * Golf Booking
  * Itinerary planning and reservation assistance
  * Private dining assistance
  * International gift delivery
  * Event planning and referrals
  * Airport VIP service (meet-and-greet) and much more.
  * ​Click [here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card#c) for Contact details & T&Cs.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card "View More")
![Infinia Debit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Reward Point Benefits
  * **A. Reward Points Accrual:**
  * Earn 5 Reward Points on every Rs.150 retail* spends including Insurance, Utilities and Education
  * Earn up to 10 times Reward Points* on your travel and shopping spends on [Smartbuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfc.bank.in/v2/infinia/home)
  * **B. Reward Points Redemption:**
  * You can redeem your Reward Points on [Smartbuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfc.bank.in/v2/infinia/home) or [Netbanking.(opens in a new tab)](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/)
  * **C. Card Reward and Redemption Program**
  * Click [here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card#c) to know more


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card "View More")

###  Card Control via My Cards 
**[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfc.bank.in/)**, a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of your Infinia Metal Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads. 
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation 


  * Set up your Card PIN 


  * Manage Card Controls like Online Spends, Contactless Transactions 


  * View Transactions / Download e-Statements 


  * Check Reward Points 


  * Block/ Re-Issue Your Card 


  * Apply for an Add-on Card, Manage, Set PIN and Card Controls for Add-on card


![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Card Reward and Redemption Program 
  * **Reward Redemption Value:**
    * Redeem your Reward Points on [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfc.bank.in/v2/infinia/home) or [NetBanking(opens in a new tab)](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/). 
    * Reward points redemption against each category can be redeemed at: 

  
| 1 Reward point Equivalent to   |  
| --- |  
| Apple products and Tanishq vouchers purchased via SmartBuy  | ₹1  |  
| Flights and hotel bookings  | ₹1  |  
| Airmiles conversion  | Upto 1 Airmile  |  
| Products and Voucher  | up to ₹0.50  |  
| Cashback against statement Balance  | up to ₹ 0.30  |  
  * **Redemption Limit:**
    * A maximum of 2 lakh reward points can be redeemed in a statement cycle. 
    * Reward point redemption will be capped at 1.5 lakh reward points per month for Flights, Hotel Bookings and airmiles. 
    * Reward points can be redeemed for up to 70% of the total bill value on purchase of Apple products and Tanishq vouchers. The remaining amount will have to be paid via Credit Card. 
    * Reward Point redemptions are capped per month to 50,000 reward points against statement balance.   
  
*Please [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card/rewards-points-program-terms-and-conditions.pdf) to know more. 


![Contactless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Contactless Payment 
  * The HDFC Bank Infinia Credit Card is enabled for contactless payments, facilitating fast, convenient and secure payments at retail outlets.
  * To see if your Card is contactless, look for the contactless network symbol on your Card.
  * (Please note that in India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5000, the Card holder has to enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons)


![Zero Cost Card Liability](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.

![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Insurance Benefits 
  * Accidental Air Death cover worth Rs. 3 Crore


  * Emergency overseas hospitalization up to Rs. 50 lakhs in case of emergency 


  * Credit Shield Cover for upto 9 lakhs 


  * [Click Here](https://connect.hdfc.bank.in/applications/webforms/apply/HDFC_NomineeDetails/Nominee.aspx) to update your nominee details.


  * [Click Here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card/Insurance-Infinia.pdf) for more details. 


![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Additional Benefits 
  * Smart EMI : HDFC Bank Infinia Credit Card comes with an option to convert your big spends into EMI after purchase. To know more [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi)
  * Foreign Currency Markup : Lowest markup fee of 2% on all foreign currency transactions.
  * Zero Lost card liability : In the unfortunate event of losing your HDFC Bank Infinia Credit Card, on reporting it immediately to our 24-hour call centre, you have zero liability on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card.
  * Interest Free Credit Period : Up to 50 days of interest free period on your HDFC Bank Infinia Credit Card from the date of purchase (subject to the submission of the charge by the Merchant)
  * Revolving Credit : Enjoy Revolving Credit on your HDFC Bank Infinia Credit Card at nominal interest rate. Refer to the Fees and Charges section to know more [click here.](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card/fees-and-charges)
  * Fuel Surcharge Waiver : 1% fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations across India on transactions between Rs.400 and Rs.1,00,000. Note - No Reward Points are earned on fuel transactions. More [Details](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card/Fuel_Transaction.pdf)


![Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

![Zero Cost Card Liability](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  INFINIA Metal Edition Card Fees and Charges 
  * For INFINIA Cards sourced after October 18, 2021:
  * Joining/Renewal Membership Fee   

    * Joining Fee: ₹12,500 plus Applicable Taxes
    * Renewal Fee: ₹12,500 plus Applicable Taxes
    * Fee Waiver: Spend ₹10 lakh or more in a year before the renewal date to get the renewal fee waived.
  * **For INFINIA Cards sourced before October 18, 2021**   

    * Joining Fee: ₹10,000 plus Applicable Taxes
    * Renewal Fee: ₹10,000 plus Applicable Taxes
    * Fee Waiver: Spend ₹8 lakh or more in a year before the renewal date to get the renewal fee waived.
    * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf) for detailed Fees and Charges
    * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/terms-and-conditions) for the Card Member Agreement​
_**Disclaimer:** Terms and conditions apply. Credit Card approvals are at the sole discretion of HDFC Bank Limited. Credit Card approvals are subject to documentation and verification as per the Bank's requirement. Interest rates are subject to change. Please check with your RM or closest bank branch for current interest rates._

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
### 
What is a Metal Credit Card? 
Metal Credit Cards are premium Credit Cards which are highly exclusive, usually available by invite only. HDFC Bank’s Infinia Metal Credit Card is available in a metallic version with many unique benefits. To get this card, you need an invitation. As a welcome benefit, you get 12,500 Reward Points upon fee realisation and card activation. 
### 
Who is eligible for an Infinia Metal Credit Card? 
HDFC Bank Infinia Metal Credit Card is offered to select customers by invitation only. The Bank will assess your eligibility and inform you personally if you qualify for the card. 
### 
Is the Infinia Metal Credit Card free? 
No, the Infinia Metal Credit Card is not free. There is a joining fee of ₹12,500 plus applicable taxes and an annual renewal fee of ₹12,500 plus applicable taxes. 
### 
What are the advantages of having an Infinia Metal Credit Card? 
The card offers a wide range of benefits: 
  * Stylish metal edition Credit Card 


  * 5 Reward Points per ₹150 spent 


  * Complimentary Club Marriott membership for the first year and 12,500 Reward Points upon fee realisation and card activation 


  * On spending ₹10 lakh or more in the preceding 12 months, get a renewal fee waiver in the next year 


  * Unlimited airport lounge access 


### 
How to Apply for a Metal Credit Card? 
Membership to this card is available by invitation only. 
### 
What is Club Marriott Membership? 
A membership to Marriott Hotels in India and Asia-Pacific region that provides benefits to members on presentation of the Club Marriott Membership Card. The benefits include:   

  * Up to 25% off on the food and beverage bill at participating restaurants. 
  * Up to 20% off on the Best Available Rate on rooms at participating Marriott hotels in India and Asia Pacific.
  * 20% off on Spa services at select participating Marriott managed spas in India.
  * [Know more](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/infinia-credit-card/Club_Marriott_Membership_T_C.pdf) about Membership registeration & other T&Cs. ​


### 
What are the documents required to obtain a Metal Credit Card? 
Membership for the HDFC Bank Infinia Metal Credit Card is available by invitation only.
